args.code:
import json
from collections import Counter

business_info = locals()['var_function-call-3797158851938178989']

all_categories = []
for business in business_info:
    description = business.get('description', '')
    # Split by common category delimiters and clean up
    if 'including' in description:
        categories_string = description.split('including')[-1]
        categories = [cat.strip() for cat in categories_string.split(',') if cat.strip()]
        all_categories.extend(categories)
    elif 'in the fields of' in description:
        categories_string = description.split('in the fields of')[-1]
        categories = [cat.strip() for cat in categories_string.split(',') if cat.strip()]
        all_categories.extend(categories)
    elif 'in the category of' in description:
        categories_string = description.split('in the category of')[-1]
        categories = [cat.strip().replace('.', '') for cat in categories_string.split(',') if cat.strip()]
        all_categories.extend(categories)

category_counts = Counter(all_categories)
top_5_categories = category_counts.most_common(5)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(top_5_categories))

val_args.code:
import json
from collections import Counter

business_info = locals()['var_function-call-3797158851938178989']

all_categories = []
for business in business_info:
    description = business.get('description', '')
    # Split by common category delimiters and clean up
    if 'including' in description:
        categories_string = description.split('including')[-1]
        categories = [cat.strip() for cat in categories_string.split(',') if cat.strip()]
        all_categories.extend(categories)
    elif 'in the fields of' in description:
        categories_string = description.split('in the fields of')[-1]
        categories = [cat.strip() for cat in categories_string.split(',') if cat.strip()]
        all_categories.extend(categories)
    elif 'in the category of' in description:
        categories_string = description.split('in the category of')[-1]
        categories = [cat.strip().replace('.', '') for cat in categories_string.split(',') if cat.strip()]
        all_categories.extend(categories)

category_counts = Counter(all_categories)
top_5_categories = category_counts.most_common(5)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(top_5_categories))
